groups.requirements: Parser-level syntax additions: (1) Dict literal unpacking {**d1, **d2, key: val} — new AST node DictUnpack, parser changes in expr_compound.rs. (2) Chained comparisons a < b < c — desugar to (a < b) and (b < c) with short-circuit, parser changes in expressions.rs. Both are parser→AST→lowering changes.

Runtime operation additions: (1) Tuple comparison operators (lt, le, gt, ge) — lexicographic comparison in tuple_ops.rs. (2) type() 3-arg dynamic class creation — type(name, bases, dict) in builtins.rs. Both are runtime-only changes.

Exception chaining: add __cause__, __context__, suppress_context to MbException. Implement 'raise X from Y' syntax. Update exception display to show chain. Changes span parser (raise-from), runtime (exception.rs), and codegen.

Class features: __slots__ (restrict instance attributes), __init_subclass__ (hook on subclass creation), properties (descriptor protocol), classmethods/staticmethods. Changes in class.rs, lowering, and codegen.
Py3.12 stdlib API conformance: audit stdlib module function signatures and return types against CPython 3.12. Fix mismatches. Primarily stdlib/*.rs changes.
